10
th
International Conference On Civil Engineering (CiViE 2026)
serves as a premier global forum for the presentation and exchange of the latest advances in civil engineering theory, methodology, applications, and emerging challenges. As the field continues to evolve in response to technological innovation, environmental pressures, and societal needs, CiViE 2026 aims to highlight research that makes a fundamental and lasting contribution to the development of modern civil engineering.
The conference brings together researchers, academicians, industry professionals, and practitioners from around the world to share cutting edge developments, innovative solutions, and transformative ideas. It provides a dynamic platform for discussing practical and theoretical results, fostering collaboration, and exploring the future directions of the discipline.
Call for Papers
CiViE 2026 invites original research papers, state of the art review articles, and industrydriven studies across all major areas of civil engineering. Authors are encouraged to submit highquality contributions that present significant advances, experimental findings, analytical models, case studies, or technological innovations.
Contributions are welcome in, but not limited to, the following areas:
Structural Engineering and Materials

10
th
International Conference on Biomedical Engineering and Science (BES 2026)
offers a premier global forum for presenting and discussing the latest innovations, research findings, and emerging challenges in Biomedical Engineering and Science. As the field continues to evolve at the intersection of engineering, biology, medicine, and data science, BES 2026 aims to highlight both theoretical advancements and practical applications that contribute fundamentally to the progress of modern healthcare technologies.
Call for Papers
The goal of BES 2026 is to unite experts from diverse domains to focus on advancements in Biomedical Engineering and Science, promote the dissemination of impactful research, and encourage the formation of new collaborations that can shape the future of healthcare. The conference welcomes original research papers, state of the art review articles, and industry driven studies that demonstrate significant contributions to theory, methodology, experimentation, and real world applications.
Authors are invited to submit high quality articles presenting research results, project outcomes, survey studies, and industrial experiences that illustrate meaningful advances in the following areas, but are not limited to:

10
th
International Conference On Civil Engineering (CiViE 2026)
serves as a premier global forum for the presentation and exchange of the latest advances in civil engineering theory, methodology, applications, and emerging challenges. As the field continues to evolve in response to technological innovation, environmental pressures, and societal needs, CiViE 2026 aims to highlight research that makes a fundamental and lasting contribution to the development of modern civil engineering.
The conference brings together researchers, academicians, industry professionals, and practitioners from around the world to share cutting edge developments, innovative solutions, and transformative ideas. It provides a dynamic platform for discussing practical and theoretical results, fostering collaboration, and exploring the future directions of the discipline.
Call for Papers
CiViE 2026 invites original research papers, state of the art review articles, and industrydriven studies across all major areas of civil engineering. Authors are encouraged to submit highquality contributions that present significant advances, experimental findings, analytical models, case studies, or technological innovations.
Contributions are welcome in, but not limited to, the following areas:

10
th
International Conference On Civil Engineering (CiViE 2026)
serves as a premier global forum for the presentation and exchange of the latest advances in civil engineering theory, methodology, applications, and emerging challenges. As the field continues to evolve in response to technological innovation, environmental pressures, and societal needs, CiViE 2026 aims to highlight research that makes a fundamental and lasting contribution to the development of modern civil engineering.
The conference brings together researchers, academicians, industry professionals, and practitioners from around the world to share cutting edge developments, innovative solutions, and transformative ideas. It provides a dynamic platform for discussing practical and theoretical results, fostering collaboration, and exploring the future directions of the discipline.
Call for Papers
CiViE 2026 invites original research papers, state of the art review articles, and industrydriven studies across all major areas of civil engineering. Authors are encouraged to submit highquality contributions that present significant advances, experimental findings, analytical models, case studies, or technological innovations.
Contributions are welcome in, but not limited to, the following areas:
